intro: Echinopepon minimus, also known as the small devil's-head gourd, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cucurbitaceae. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage.
